objective: Activate the accepted D2 TOPT capture spine against bounded live public sources in isolated Staging without changing the 20-issuer, 21-instrument, 84-cell denominator.
claim_ceiling: E4 bounded live-source TOPT capture in isolated Staging; no headcount, factor, strategy, mart, continuous-schedule, source-rights graduation, Production, or release-readiness claim

requirements: queued D3 registration is merged to main
the implementation PR pins its exact current main base SHA
the frozen E0 corpus path and SHA-256 are committed before execution
an independent reviewer is assigned before each rung acceptance
issue #171 contains this exact manifest path and SHA-256
each implementation PR advances at most one evidence rung and merges before the next rung starts

dependencies.artifact: accepted D2 E3 TOPT data-plane evidence

later_claim_dependencies: #60 accepted source-readiness, rights, and budget evidence remains mandatory before any Production or graduated source-readiness claim
#61 accepted applicability and SLO policy remains mandatory before Core readiness acceptance
#70 supplies the filing-to-headcount handoff that this 84-cell capture-only batch does not implement
#24, #25, #71, and #26 must freeze and integrate the Core candidate before #27 can close
#27 owns two scheduled full Core Strategy runs; this batch supplies only its bounded live capture prerequisite

corpus.environment: E0-E3 Local/CI frozen mocks and ephemeral stores; E4 isolated Staging public-source run
required_strata: exact SEC N-PORT accession bytes and 21 selected U.S. equity instruments
20 distinct issuers with GOOG and GOOGL retained as sibling instruments
XOM predecessor identity at the fixed report date
issuer-security, security-listing, universe-membership, and market-price cells for every instrument
Decimal-safe Yahoo OHLCV parsing without float persistence
predeclared scope and source-call plan before any network request
identical retry and changed-byte append-only vintage
missing identity, listing, membership, price, confidence, lineage, and raw-object failure controls
terminal isolated Staging run with exact commit, configuration, scope, manifest, evaluation, and run identities

allowed: SEC EDGAR N-PORT for the exact accepted accession
SEC identifier material required for the fixed denominator
OpenFIGI mapping for at most the 21 selected instruments
Yahoo chart responses for at most the 21 selected listings
forbidden: analyst, forecast, LLM, paid-vendor, or unrestricted Moomoo sweeps
Production credentials or Production database writes

budget.claim: bounded engineering canary only; not the #60 full-catalog budget approval

release_activation.reason: D3 is a bounded capture prerequisite; default schedules, Core strategy release, and Production activation remain forbidden

negative_controls: wrong D2 evidence, runtime handoff, TOPT accession, universe, issuer count, instrument count, or required-cell count
network request before scope and call-plan freeze
float, null, malformed, wrong-date, wrong-symbol, or internally inconsistent OHLCV input
unresolved XOM predecessor or collapsed GOOG and GOOGL instruments
missing identity, listing, membership, price, confidence, lineage, policy, or freshness evidence
denominator shrink, post-run applicability change, or aggregate-ratio substitution
UPDATE or DELETE of raw or normalized vintages
default schedule, release registration, Production source call, or Production database write

allowed_evidence_readers: issue #70 filing and headcount capture preparation

invalidation: D2 evidence/handoff, TOPT accession, denominator, registry contract, PIT rule, confidence rule, or required-cell set change creates a new D3 revision
source response schema or Decimal parsing change reruns the exact frozen corpus before any later rung
a need to edit a read-only integration path blocks the rung until a reviewed lease or separate repair batch merges
Staging evidence from a commit other than the reviewed exact main SHA is rejected
a broader source or universe request requires a separate batch and cannot raise this claim ceiling
rollback: Revert only the latest D3 rung and disable its explicit Staging command; immutable raw objects, normalized vintages, manifests, evaluations, and prior D2 evidence are never deleted or rewritten.
